'''Karrison Lee''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who was fond of [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] even though he was not particularly good at it. He was a patron at the [[Ace of Sabres]] on the planet [[Kluistar]].

==Biography==
He had been imprisoned by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] at least three times, but always managed to escape. He also had been double-crossed and sold out by friends and partners many times, so he was very reluctant to trust others.

==Personality and traits==
Karrin was a typical brash smuggler who also enjoyed almost every form of gambling although he rarely won. He was personable and easy-going although because of his occupation and history he was reluctant to move beyond small talk. He was willing to transport almost anything anywhere anytime as long as the price was right.

==Equipment==
He owned a modified [[YT-2000 light freighter/Legends|YT-2000 light freighter]] called the ''[[Distant Sunrise]]''. He also carried around a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]].

==Behind the scenes==
Karrison Lee was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].
